title: SpaceX stock sinks for a second-straight day, nearing $135 IPO price
summary_full: SpaceX went public a month ago in a record IPO. Elon Musk's space and AI company was added to the Nasdaq-100 last week.
summary_public: SpaceX went public a month ago in a record IPO. Elon Musk's space and AI company was added to the Nasdaq-100 last week.
